label: Runtime assurance, monitors & safety envelopes

node.label: Runtime assurance, monitors & safety envelopes
node.definition: Runtime assurance monitors a deployed system and blocks, overrides, degrades, or transfers control when behavior approaches a defined safety boundary.
node.why_it_matters: It provides protection when correctness cannot be fully established before deployment.
limitations: Monitors can miss unmodeled hazards, trigger too late, or become a single point of failure.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Runtime assurance, monitors & safety envelopes has an `evaluates_or_constrains` dependency on Formal verification of agents & plans because Formal verification of agents & plans is modeled as evaluation, constraint, audit, or governance support.

In this atlas graph, Runtime assurance, monitors & safety envelopes has a `verifies_with` dependency on Human-in-the-loop, permissions & sandboxing because Human-in-the-loop, permissions & sandboxing is modeled as evidence or constraints for verification.

In this atlas graph, Runtime assurance, monitors & safety envelopes has an `evaluates_or_constrains` dependency on Reproducibility, drift & continuous monitoring because Reproducibility, drift & continuous monitoring is modeled as evaluation, constraint, audit, or governance support.

In this atlas graph, Runtime assurance, monitors & safety envelopes has an `evaluates_or_constrains` dependency on Dynamical systems & control theory because Dynamical systems & control theory is modeled as evaluation, constraint, audit, or governance support.
